author: seonggoos
description: Visual drag-and-drop calendar for daily and weekly schedule notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: seonggoos
manifest.description: Visual drag-and-drop calendar for daily and weekly schedule notes.
manifest.name: Schedule Calendar

name: Schedule Calendar

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
### Added
- Automatic integration with the core Daily Notes folder, date format, and template
- Manual daily-note folder and Moment.js date-format fallback
- Template-aware creation of missing daily notes with automatic schedule-section insertion
- Side-by-side layout for overlapping timed events in daily and weekly views
- Markdown checkbox completion controls for timed events
- All-day events using checkbox entries without a time range
- Horizontal drag between dates in weekly view, including creation of a missing target daily note
- Conflict-safe multi-file undo for cross-day moves
- Parser and overlap-layout regression tests for the new behavior

### Changed
- Newly created events use checkbox syntax while existing non-checkbox timed entries retain their format
- Daily mutations refresh all event regions, including all-day events
releases.name: Schedule Calendar 1.3.0

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
## Fixed in 1.2.2

- Set the accurate minimum Obsidian version to 1.8.7
- Added the official `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` submission checks
- Resolved all reported lint errors and warnings
- Added popout-window compatibility with `activeDocument`
- Replaced direct visibility styling with CSS classes
- Explicitly handled all asynchronous UI callbacks
- Updated the command ID to rely on Obsidian namespacing
- Updated TypeScript, esbuild, and Obsidian API type dependencies

Validation: official Obsidian lint 0 errors / 0 warnings, 14 tests passed, typecheck and production build passed.

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.2.1

- Full Korean and English UI localization
- Automatically follows the current Obsidian language
- English fallback for unsupported languages
- Localized navigation, settings, notices, statistics, dates, placeholders, and accessibility labels
- Added localization regression tests

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.2.0

### Added
- Mobile-friendly **Add event** button with the next 15-minute slot preselected
- One-click daily note creation when the selected date has no note
- Strict time validation with clear feedback for invalid or reversed ranges
- Parser and write-back regression tests

### Improved
- Atomic note updates using Obsidian's `Vault.process()` API
- Conflict-safe undo that never overwrites newer external edits
- Exact editing and deletion when identical event lines exist
- Native time inputs with 15-minute steps
- CRLF line-ending preservation
- Immediate popup listener cleanup and vault-root folder support

### Fixed
- Default schedule heading now consistently uses `### Schedule`
- Invalid and reversed schedule ranges are ignored instead of corrupting stats

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.1.0

### Added
- **Drag tooltip** — floating `HH:MM – HH:MM` label follows the cursor during any drag or resize
- **Undo** (`Cmd/Ctrl+Z`) — reverts the last change (drag, resize, edit, delete, add), up to 20 steps
- **Tag colors** — events with `#tag` in their title get a unique accent color; monthly chips reflect the same colors
- **Daily stats bar** — total scheduled time + per-tag time breakdown below the daily timeline
- **Zoom** — `−` / `+` buttons in the header scale the timeline density (0.75× / 1× / 1.5× / 2×)
- **Top resize** — drag the top edge of an event to adjust its start time (daily view)
- **Note link** (`↗`) — edit popup shows an open button when the event title contains a `[[wiki link]]`

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
- Fix: replace builtin-modules with native module.builtinModules
- Fix: remove detachLeavesOfType from onunload
- Fix: use Setting.setHeading() in settings tab
- Fix: apply normalizePath() to all vault paths
- Fix: add punctuation to plugin description
- Rename: plugin ID and name to Schedule Calendar

releases.author: seonggoos
releases.description:
## Schedule Calendar v1.0.0

Visual drag-and-drop calendar for Obsidian daily notes.

### Features
- Daily / Weekly / Monthly views
- Drag events to reschedule, resize to change duration
- Click to edit event title and time
- Double-click empty area to add new event (with hover preview)
- Auto-sync changes back to note files
- Configurable schedule section name, note folder, and default event duration
